2605.12332.title: Towards Automated Air Traffic Safety Assessment Around Non-Towered Airports Using Large Language Models
2605.12332.paper_summary: We investigate frameworks for post-flight safety analysis at non-towered airports using large language models (LLMs). Non-towered airports rely on the Common Traffic Advisory Frequency (CTAF) for air traffic coordination and experience frequent near mid-air collisions due to the pilot self-announcement communication protocol. We propose a general vision-language model (VLM) approach to analyze the transcribed CTAF radio communications in natural language, METeorological Aerodrome Report (METAR) weather data, Automatic Dependent Surveillance-Broadcast (ADS-B) flight trajectories, and Visual Flight Rules sectional charts of the airfield. We provide a preliminary study at Half Moon Bay Airport, with a qualitative real world case study and a quantitative evaluation using a new synthetic dataset of communications and weather modalities. We qualitatively evaluate our framework on real flight data using Gemini 2.5 Pro, demonstrating accurate identification of a right-of-way violation. The synthetic dataset is derived from real examples and includes a 12-category hazard taxonomy, and is used to benchmark three open-source (Qwen 2.5-7B, Mistral-7B, Gemma-2-9B) and three closed-source (GPT-4o, GPT-5.4, Claude Sonnet 4.6) LLM models on the subset of inputs related to CTAF and METAR. Even limited to CTAF and METAR inputs and open source LLMs, instances of our framework typically achieve a macro F1 score above 0.85 on a binary nominal/danger classification task. Future work includes a quantitative evaluation across all modalities and a larger number of real world examples. Taken together, our results suggest that VLM analysis of safety at non-towered airports may be a valuable future capability.
2605.12332.paper_summary_zh: 我們調查了在無塔機場使用大型語言模型（LLMs）進行飛行後安全分析的框架。無塔機場依賴於公共交通諮詢頻率（CTAF）進行空中交通協調，並因飛行員自我公告的通信協議而經常發生近乎空中碰撞的事件。我們提出了一種通用的視覺-語言模型（VLM）方法，以分析轉錄的CTAF無線電通信、自然語言的氣象報告（METAR）天氣數據、自動依賴監視廣播（ADS-B）飛行軌跡，以及機場的視覺飛行規則分區圖。我們在半月灣機場提供了一項初步研究，包含一個定性的真實案例研究和一個使用新的合成數據集進行的定量評估，該數據集涵蓋通信和天氣模式。我們使用Gemini 2.5 Pro對真實飛行數據定性評估我們的框架，展示了對優先通行違規的準確識別。合成數據集源自真實範例，並包含12類危險分類法，並用於基準測試三個開源（Qwen 2.5-7B、Mistral-7B、Gemma-2-9B）和三個閉源（GPT-4o、GPT-5.4、Claude Sonnet 4.6）LLM模型，針對與CTAF和METAR相關的輸入子集。即使僅限於CTAF和METAR輸入及開源LLMs，我們的框架實例通常在二元名義/危險分類任務上達到0.85以上的宏觀F1分數。未來的工作包括對所有模式的定量評估以及更多的真實案例。綜合來看，我們的結果表明，對無塔機場安全的VLM分析可能是一項有價值的未來能力。
2605.12332.author: Torsten Darrell et.al.
2605.12332.authors: Torsten Darrell, Mahyar Ghazanfari, Jordan Kam, Alexandre Bayen, Amin Tabrizian, Peng Wei
